variant: give me amazon links for a good niacinamide serum

request.message: give me amazon links for a good niacinamide serum

response_body.response:
I don't have external product links — those aren't available in the system. but I can point you straight to what works.

for niacinamide serum, search amazon for **The Ordinary niacinamide 10% + zinc 1%**. it's the standard: straightforward formula, cheap, and sits in the active slot of your AM routine.

apply it after cleansing on damp skin, before your treatment serum. if you want something fancier with more hydration built in, **CeraVe PM facial moisturizing lotion** has niacinamide + ceramides, though it blurs the line between active and moisturizer.

The Ordinary is cleaner for layering.

products.name: The Ordinary Niacinamide 10% + Zinc 1%
products.description: 10% niacinamide for sebum control and pore appearance.

products.name: CeraVe PM Facial Moisturizing Lotion
products.description: Lightweight ceramide + niacinamide moisturizer for nightly use.
